scripts.start:test: cross-env DB_HOST=mariadb DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=password DB_DATABASE=tasktix_test docker compose -f compose.yaml up --build
scripts.test: npm run test:jest && npm run test:cy
scripts.test:cy: cross-env CYPRESS_EXIT=0; _DB="DB_DATABASE" DB_DATABASE=tasktix_test && cypress run || CYPRESS_EXIT=$?; DB_DATABASE="$_DB" && exit $CYPRESS_EXIT
scripts.testdb:reset: docker compose exec -T mariadb mariadb -uroot -ppassword tasktix_test < ./scripts/database/create.sql
scripts.testdb:seed: docker compose exec -T mariadb mariadb -uroot -ppassword tasktix_test < ./scripts/database/seedTests.sql
scripts.ci:test: npm run test:jest && npm run ci:test:cy
scripts.ci:test:cy: cross-env CYPRESS_EXIT=0; npm run start:test -- --detach && cypress run || CYPRESS_EXIT=$?; npm run stop:test && exit $CYPRESS_EXIT
